title: Add phone number formatting utility
description: Create src/utils/formatPhone.ts with a utility function that formats phone numbers. The function should handle various phone number formats and return a consistently formatted string (e.g., (555) 123-4567 or +1 555-123-4567).
existing_patterns: src/utils/format-number.ts - Pattern for formatting utilities with options interface, JSDoc examples, and locale-aware behavior
src/utils/format-currency.ts - Currency formatting pattern for similar utility
src/utils/format-date.ts - Date formatting utility following same structure
